rows.label: tev001694_MSG0001
rows.name: Hiya, [ST:playername ]![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001694_MSG0002
rows.name: Aren't VTOL aircraft incredible?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001694_MSG0003
rows.name:
You know Matthew the mechanic, right? He calls
our VTOL transports "V-trancers." As you might
expect, the name hasn't really caught on.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001694_MSG0004
rows.name:
When I think of airplanes, I still imagine
the old-school kind with propellers.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001694_MSG0005
rows.name:
My dad had a single-prop
airplane back on Earth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001694_MSG0006
rows.name:
Every time he used to take me up
in that thing, I'd spend the trip
praying we didn't die in a crash.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001694_MSG0007
rows.name:
Kinda weird to think I'll
never ride in it again.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001694_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev001694_SEL0011
rows.name:
Ask Axena why she hasn't
brought up...you-know-whats.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001694_JNK0020
rows.name: Reassure

rows.label: tev001694_SEL0021
rows.name:
Remind Axena that at least
she can ride in Dolls now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001694_MSG0013
rows.name:
You're very perceptive! But yes,
that's correct. I'm trying not to
talk about...you-know-whats today.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001694_MSG0015
rows.name:
Yeah, I guess I'll
always have my Ske—OH![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001694_MSG0016
rows.name: I almost said it! Yiiiikes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001694_MSG0018
rows.name:
Tika said that if she has to listen to one more
speech about...you-know-whats, she's going to
have the maintenance center dissect my brain.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001694_MSG0019
rows.name:
And even with that, I STILL can't stop thinking about
running my fingers down the chassis of a...you-know-
what. What if Tika's right? Maybe my brain is broken.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001694_MSG0020
rows.name:
Anyway, I'm trying to prove that I can
control my obsession and there's nothing
wrong with me. But it's pretty hard![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001694_JNK0030
rows.name: Support[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001694_SEL0031
rows.name:
Praise Axena for trying to
focus on other things.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001694_JNK0040
rows.name: Undermine[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001694_SEL0041
rows.name:
Try to trick Axena into
saying the word "Doll."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001694_MSG0027
rows.name:
Yeah, exactly! That's why I was trying
to talk about plain-old aircraft.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001694_MSG0028
rows.name:
I mean, transports aren't so dissimilar
from...you-know- whats. They're
impressive in their own way, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001694_MSG0029
rows.name:
Much less impressive, obviously, but
they make for a nice change of pace.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001694_MSG0030
rows.name: I mean...kinda.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001694_MSG0031
rows.name:
You know, standing here and talking about
this stuff is really bumming me out.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001694_MSG0032
rows.name:
I think I'm gonna go take a little walk
down in the administrative district.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001694_MSG0033
rows.name:
Just to get some fresh air, mind you!
Not so I can look at any...you-know-whats
out of the corner of my eye.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001694_MSG0037
rows.name:
Huh? You're giving me
a pop quiz? Uh, okay.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001694_MSG0038
rows.name:
"What do you call the body-shaped models
that science students use to learn about
bones?" This is a strange quiz. Okay. Ummm...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001694_MSG0039
rows.name: Oh, geez...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001694_MSG0040
rows.name: Anatomical dummies, maybe?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001694_MSG0041
rows.name:
...What, that's wrong? Well then,
ask me another one, I guess.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001694_MSG0042
rows.name:
"What do you call a key that can open any lock?"
Huh... Hmm... Key... Lock key... Locking key...
Key lime pie... Keystone cop... Key Largo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001694_MSG0043
rows.name: Hmmmmmm...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001694_MSG0044
rows.name:
Oh, it's a master key! BOOM!
Nailed it! Score one for Axena![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001694_MSG0045
rows.name:
Um, why are you gritting your
teeth like that? I'm pretty
sure I totally nailed it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001694_MSG0046
rows.name:
Look, I never said I was a scientist
OR a locksmith! Why are you asking
me such weird questions, weirdo?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001694_MSG0047
rows.name:
I'm sorry! You look so frustrated right now! I'm
just not that good with word puzzles and junk. You
know? Two trains leave a station and...whatever?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001694_MSG0048
rows.name: All I really know about is Dolls.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001694_MSG0049
rows.name: AAAAAAAAARRRRGGGGH! I JUST SAID IT![ST:wait ]
